records.ety: [Pref. col- + L. liquare, liquatum, to melt.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Colliquated; p. pr. & vb. n. Colliquating.]

defs: To change from solid to fluid; to make or become liquid; to melt.
quotes: The ore of it is colliquated by the violence of the fire.
[Ice] will colliquate in water or warm oil.
